---
title: "Gallery of Illustrations"
description: "Post description"
lightbox: true
cap-location: top
---

:::::: {.panel-tabset}

### Hansel & Gretel

![Character Line Up](h&g/line-up_Final-1.jpg){group="hg-gallery"}

![Spread 01 - Coming back home ...](h&g/Portfolio01-H_and_G_page_1and2-low-res.jpg){group="hg-gallery"}

![Spread 02 - The stepmother was not kind ...](h&g/H-and-G_spread-02.webp){group="hg-gallery"}

![Discovering the Candy House (At Dawn)](h&g/Portfolio04-H_and_G_page_X2.jpg){group="hg-gallery"}

![Discovering the Candy House (At Night)](h&g/Candy_House_Characters.jpg){group="hg-gallery"}

![Gretel Turn around](h&g/Hansel.jpg){group="hg-gallery"}

![Hansel Turn around](h&g/Grefel_Turnaround%20(1).jpg){group="hg-gallery"}

### Other

![Alt text](Portfolio_John_space_tentacle2.jpg){group="other-gallery"}

![Alt text](van-vs-dino3.jpg){group="other-gallery"}

![Alt text](Portfolio06-Ronan_Wasp.jpg){group="other-gallery"}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Alt text](bear%20and%20the%20bee.jpg){group="other-gallery"}

![Alt text](Robbotprabbit-color_export.jpg){group="other-gallery"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Alt text](Frog%20-%20bard%20color.jpg){group="other-gallery"}

![Alt text](space-pig-blue.jpg){group="other-gallery"}
:::

![Alt text](kid%20and%20spider-lowres.jpg){group="other-gallery"}


![Alt text](Portfolio01-a.jpg){group="other-gallery"}

::::::
